arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star Jay Emmanuel-Thomas charged with importing drugs in £600k plot
arts.sum: Jay Emmanuel-Thomas, who plays for Greenock Morton in the Scottish Championship, has been charged by police for allegedly trying to smuggle cannabis into the UK

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal striker is charged with importing drugs after £600,000 of cannabis is seized at Stansted Airport
arts.sum: Former Arsenal striker Jay Emmanuel-Thomas has been charged with importing drugs after '£600,000 of cannabis' was seized at Stansted Airport, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans sure over Odegaard clue in Mikel Arteta press conference
arts.sum: A fifth added: “It looks to me more like he’s genuinely hoping it isn’t months, indicating that it’s a possibility.” Straw-clutching Arsenal fans reckon Martin Odegaard’s injury may not be as bad as feared after watching a Mikel Arteta press conference.

arts.ttl: Why is Martin Ødegaard not playing for Arsenal against Atalanta today in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Norwegian midfielder Martin Ødegaard will not play against Atalanta in their Champions League opener, as an injury will keep him out for the short term future. When Mikel Arteta was asked about the issue to his star creative midfielder, he did little to calm the worries of the fans, saying that his player had suffered a “ quite significant ” ankle ligament injury .

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal and Aberdeen forward charged over £600k drugs seizure
arts.sum: Footballer Jay Emmanuel-Thomas has been arrested and charged in connection with the seizure of around £600,000 worth of cannabis at Stansted Airport.
Warren Ashurst has taken a look at the fixture list for the Premier League Week Five and has selected a score prediction for each match across the weekend.

arts.ttl: Three ways Arsenal can line up without Martin Odegaard as captain set for extended spell out
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will be forced to try out different combinations in midfield for Arsenal's matches against Atalanta and Manchester City, with Martin Odegaard out injured

arts.ttl: Three key Atalanta-Arsenal battles to watch: Lookman challenges White
arts.sum: As Gian Piero Gasperini’s Atalanta prepare to face Mikel Arteta’s Arsenal in the first round...

arts.ttl: 'He can': Jorginho makes exciting Ethan Nwaneri prediction before Arsenal face Atalanta
Ruben Dias makes telling Man City admission ahead of crunch Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Man City defender Ruben Dias says Pep Guardiola's players are "hiding from nothing" and relish the challenge of facing Premier League title rivals Arsenal on Sunday so early on in the season
